Name: Edenya Srl
Description:
Edenya offre soluzioni localizzate per il riscaldamento e il raffrescamento delle aree produttive dove risulta antieconomico un impianto di climatizzazione tradizionale. I suoi sistemi di irraggiamento diretto a infrarossi per il riscaldamento di aree circoscritte e unità di raffrescamento eco-friendly sono di semplice e rapida installazione. 
I raffrescatori adiabatici utilizzano un sistema di purificazione dell'aria tramite evaporazione che permette di introdurla di nuovo nell'ambiente filtrata e con una temperatura inferiore rispetto all'ingresso. Questi impianti rappresentano oggi la più economica, tecnologica ed ecologica realtà presente sul mercato per raffrescare grandi volumi. 
Il riscaldamento si ottiene tramite l'emissione di onde corte, medie o lunghe, in base al sistema scelto. L'irraggiamento a infrarossi riscalda la materia e non l'aria, generando un calore avvolgente e offrendo un comfort unico. Adatto per le brevi esposizioni, anche all'aperto, oppure per l'intera giornata nelle postazioni fisse.

Name: PLEXSTAR
Description:
Plexstar specialise in asset recovery and the disposal of electronic, IT and Telecommunications equipment.

We have built our business on delivering secure and reliable asset recovery and data destruction solutions, ensuring your environmental compliance and data security by safely and securely disposing of your electronic assets.
For over 30 years, we have been the valued recycling partner to our customers who span a variety of sectors in Education, Finance, MOD, IT, Rail, Retail, Utilities and Telecommunications. 

Services include -
Data Destruction
We offer a bespoke and tailored service to meet your individual data destruction requirements for your redundant electronic assets.
All types of data media can be destroyed to guarantee 100% data integrity for your business

Asset Disposal and Waste Electronic and Electrical Equipment (WEEE)
Containers
We can provide you with suitable containers to store your material at your premises prior to collection and we are able to advise you on your compliance obligations in relation to the handling and storage of your material. 

Collection 
We will arrange for the collection your electronic equipment from your premises at a time to suit you from anywhere in the UK or Europe.
Our comprehensive logistics network allows us to control the transition of your material from loading at point of origin, transit to our premises via our tracked vehicles to the processing of the material at our facility, giving you a trusted and secure solution for all of your electronic disposal needs.
Decommissioning
We undertake all types of decommissioning from office IT, telephone systems and servers to de-rigging antenna and towers, telecom cabins and rooftop disassembly.
Our team of technicians and operatives will remove your equipment in a secure and efficient manner.

Name: HP HOPE
Description:
HP HOPE is HP’s global device donation program, created to accelerate future ready workforce development and extend the useful life of technology through a scalable, collaborative model. By providing access to technology, AI, and essential digital skills for the future of work, the program helps Harness Opportunities for the Planet and Economies (HOPE), advancing workforce readiness, strengthening community economic development, and supporting the circularity of HP products while contributing to global carbon emissions avoidance.

HP HOPE enables the secure collection, certified data wiping, and refurbishment of end of use HP devices, which are then redeployed to support disconnected communities around the world. All refurbished devices are processed under HP’s strict quality standards and include a one year HP warranty, offering a unique level of trust and reliability.

What makes HP HOPE unique is its ecosystem based approach: it integrates HP’s operational capabilities, a certified and trusted network of refurbishment and logistics partners, and the active participation of HP customers, who donate their used devices to be transformed into tools for societal and economic progress.

Through nonprofit organizations with deep community presence, HP HOPE extends its reach into the places where support is most needed. These partners bring local knowledge, established trust, and strong relationships within their communities, making it possible for the program to operate effectively and deliver technology and digital AI training where it can have the greatest societal impact.

Name: HOPE Recycling Futures
Description:
Back in December 2020, we did our very first donation of 12 PCs to a School in Bulgaria, setting up the foundations of what has become the HP Global Donation Program: HOPE Recycling Futures. 

Giving a second life to PCs eligible for disposal has taken on a bigger purpose through HP HOPE Recycling Futures. Designed to advance education and digital equity for disadvantaged children and youth, HP remanufactures HP laptops coming from our employees, customers, or partners and then donates them to nonprofit organizations and schools. 

Leveraging HP’s global repair network and supply chain capabilities, HOPE Recycling Futures is refurbishing HP PCs to high-quality standards and entitling them with one year of extended support. The PCs are also equipped with Operating System and the pioneering HP proactive insight software, TechPulse. 
 
Currently working in close collaboration with +50 schools and non-profit organization in 14 countries, the program is fully enabled in all European Union countries (including Switzerland and UK, Brazil, India and Singapore, with additional expansion planned for Mexico and USA before end of 2024.

En ce qui concerne la domotique, TORMAX offre une large gamme de produits et de services permettant de contrôler et d'automatiser divers aspects de votre domicile. Cela comprend l'éclairage, le chauffage, la climatisation, les systèmes de sécurité, les stores et les volets, ainsi que les appareils électroménagers. Grâce à des technologies avancées et des systèmes de contrôle intuitifs, vous pouvez gérer ces éléments à distance à partir de votre smartphone, de votre tablette ou d'autres appareils connectés.

En ce qui concerne les réseaux, l'entreprise propose des solutions de câblage structuré pour garantir une connectivité fiable et rapide dans votre maison ou votre bureau. Cela inclut la mise en place de réseaux Ethernet, de systèmes de communication vocale sur IP (VoIP) et de réseaux sans fil performants. TORMAX se concentre sur la création d'infrastructures réseau solides et évolutives, adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client.

Quant aux portes motorisées, l'entreprise propose des solutions sur mesure pour automatiser l'ouverture et la fermeture des portes résidentielles et commerciales. Que ce soit pour les portes de garage, les portails ou les portes d'entrée, TORMAX utilise des moteurs et des mécanismes fiables et sécurisés pour offrir un contrôle pratique et une protection accrue.

L'objectif principal de TORMAX est de simplifier la vie quotidienne de ses clients en rendant leurs espaces plus intelligents, plus pratiques et plus sécurisés. Grâce à leur expertise dans la domotique, les réseaux et les portes motorisées, ils peuvent fournir des solutions technologiques avancées qui répondent aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet.

Name: Zeroo
Description:
Zeroo - Smart Packaging Solutions it is a company specialized in the development of intelligent and sustainable packaging mainly for the food and beverages market. It was launched as a partnership between the startup The Loop Co. and the Loja Do Zero (Zero Store).

The joint venture between the two companies has already given rise to the Zero Cups project, a concept of intelligent and circular packaging that aims to revolutionize bulk shopping. These continuously circulating packages maintain a history of information, traceability, and measure the environmental impact throughout their lifecycle.

The Zero Cups project is a promising concept. By creating intelligent and circular packaging, the company seeks to revolutionize the way people shop for bulk products. These packages have the ability to maintain a history of information, enabling product traceability and measuring their environmental impact throughout their lifecycle.

The idea behind intelligent and circular packaging is to create a more sustainable system by reducing the amount of waste generated from product consumption. Instead of discarding the packaging after use, it is returned to the system, undergoes proper cleaning, and is ready to be used again. 
In this way, the company aims to promote a circular economy and reduce waste.

This approach also allows consumers to access relevant information about the products they are purchasing, such as origin, ingredients, production date, and other important data for making conscious decisions. Additionally, tracking the environmental impact throughout the product's lifecycle can help consumers make more sustainable choices.

Description:
At ICT Company, we specialise in comprehensive IT asset management and electronics recycling solutions tailored for large corporates, data centres, managed service providers (MSPs), and small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) across Ireland. Our commitment is to deliver sustainable, secure, and compliant services that support your business needs and environmental goals.

Sustainable IT Asset Management
We understand the importance of responsible IT asset management. Our team ensures that your IT assets are managed efficiently, maximising their lifecycle and minimising environmental impact. We provide end-to-end solutions from acquisition to disposal, ensuring every step is handled with care and expertise.

Certified Data Destruction
Data security is paramount in today’s digital landscape. Our R2 certified data destruction services guarantee that your sensitive information is securely wiped or destroyed, protecting your business from potential data breaches. Whether it’s through on-site hard disk shredding or secure data wiping, we adhere to the highest standards of data security.

Compliant Recycling
Environmental compliance is at the core of our recycling services. We offer compliant recycling solutions that ensure your electronic waste is processed in line with Irish and EU regulations. Our services help reduce your carbon footprint and promote sustainable practices within your organisation.

Secure Shredding Services
Our mobile shredding units provide on-site destruction of hard drives, tapes, and other storage media. This service ensures that your data is irretrievable, giving you peace of mind that your information is safe from unauthorised access.

Data Centre Decommissioning
Decommissioning a data centre requires meticulous planning and execution. Our team is experienced in managing data centre clear-outs, removals, and decommissioning projects. We ensure a seamless transition, handling all aspects from equipment removal to secure data destruction.

Das Beste daran? Der Gewinn der Verkäufe wird an wohltätige Organisationen gespendet. 
Alle Auszubildenden und dualen Studierenden sind Teil des Teams und übernehmen Verantwortung im Tagesgeschäft - ohne direkte Unterstützung der Ausbilder, aber mit deren Rückhalt bei Bedarf. Aufgestellt ist reguse wie ein echtes Unternehmen mit Abteilungen wie Marketing, IT oder Auftragsmanagement. 
So lernen die Nachwuchskräfte praxisnah, wie ein Unternehmen funktioniert, stärken Teamarbeit und Eigenverantwortung, helfen dabei der Umwelt und unterstützen zugleich wohltätige Zwecke.

Unser Motto: reduce, reguse recycle!

Name: ayushfreelencer
Description:
Digital marketing has become an essential aspect of any successful business strategy in today's world. As more and more consumers spend their time online, it has become crucial for businesses to establish a strong online presence in order to reach and engage with their target audience. Digital marketing encompasses a wide range of tactics, including search engine optimization (SEO), pay-per-click advertising (PPC), social media marketing, email marketing, content marketing, and more.

By providing digital marketing services, businesses can help their clients to develop and execute effective online marketing strategies that drive traffic, generate leads, and ultimately increase sales. This includes conducting market research to identify target audiences, creating compelling content that resonates with those audiences, optimizing websites and landing pages for search engines, and utilizing social media platforms to build brand awareness and engage with customers.

In addition to the benefits of increased brand visibility and customer engagement, digital marketing also allows businesses to track and measure the effectiveness of their marketing efforts in real time. By analyzing metrics such as website traffic, click-through rates, and conversion rates, businesses can make data-driven decisions about how to optimize their marketing strategies for maximum impact.

Overall, providing digital marketing services can help businesses to stay competitive in an increasingly digital world, while also providing valuable support and expertise to their clients.

Name: ITSD
Description:
ITSD is a total IT Asset lifecycle management solution for end-of-life IT equipment. With facilities in Sydney NSW and Melbourne Victoria, ITSD provides IT Asset Disposal (ITAD) services to all states and territories of Australia.

Established in 1995, ITSD has witnessed and been a part of the ever-evolving changes in the ITAD space. From grass roots operations, ITSD has grown organically to be one the longest-running and trusted ITAD companies in Australia.

ITSD specialises in the management of redundant and ex lease equipment from rollout, remarketing and data destruction, through to recycling.

Our approach is transparency with our customers. We work with our customers, helping them plan their rollout projects and returns so that they can achieve their desired outcomes.

ITSD has strong national and international remarketing networks, ensuring we can provide a holistic approach to our services, including competitive returns.

ITSD SERVICES: IT logistics, diagnostic testing and reporting, enterprise installations and deinstalls, redeployment, data sanitisation services, project management, electronic recycling

ITSD services and internal procedures are certified to the following international standards; ISO 9001 (Quality), ISO 14001 (Environmental) and ISO 45001 (Occupational Health & Safety).

Name: Secure Hard Drive Destruction (SHDD)
Description:
A long-term service provider to the Australian DoD, Multiple Federal and State Government departments, Large Banks and International Defence Primes. 

Secure Hard Drive Destruction (SHDD) provides an end-to-end  secure disposal environment for ‘Highly Classified’ and ‘Security Protected Attractive Assets’ such as ICT media & assets, ITAR, weapons, explosive ordnances (free from explosives) and systems from ‘End-of-Life’ Defence vehicles (Air/Sea/Land).  

Secure Hard Drive Destruction has developed the most secure environment for classified and security protected attractive asset disposal in Australia; under the instruction and guidance of the Protective Security Policy Framework (PSPF), Defence Security Policy Framework (DSPF) and ASD Information Security Manual (ISM).  

With SCEC endorsed, NSA and ATF approved processes and equipment, membership with NAID AAA PSPF, BnEI and the Australian Community (amongst many other accreditations and credentials) we provide proprietary packaging, transport, storage and disposal services down to 2mm destruction. 

SHDD helps its customers meet the stringent requirements of secure disposals for small to major projects, protecting national security of vital information and assets at their ‘End-of-Life’.  

With highly skilled security officers and AGSVA cleared personnel our knowledge, security certifications and endorsements are second to none – meeting the highest security disposal requirements in Australia.

Name: Mr Ecycle
Description:
Welcome to Mr. E-Cycle, where we lead the charge in the digital sustainability revolution by pioneering responsible electronic waste recycling. At the forefront of the e-recycling landscape, we redefine the relationship between technology and sustainability with comprehensive solutions.

 Our Mission:
At Mr. E-Cycle, we're on a mission to mitigate the environmental impact of electronic waste and lead the way towards a circular economy. Envisioning a world where e-waste transforms into valuable resources, we're dedicated to preserving our planet for future generations.

 Services and Expertise:
Our core services cover secure and environmentally friendly disposal of electronic devices, from consumer electronics to corporate IT equipment. We employ cutting-edge technologies that extract valuable materials while adhering to the highest industry standards in data destruction and privacy.

 Environmental Responsibility:
Responsible recycling, for us, goes beyond mere disposal. Our processes strictly comply with environmental regulations, ensuring the safe and ethical handling of hazardous materials. By adopting eco-friendly practices, we contribute to a sustainable future while minimizing the carbon footprint associated with electronic waste.

 Technology and Innovation:
Leveraging advanced recycling technologies, we maximize resource recovery from e-waste. Our commitment to innovation extends to research collaborations, pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the e-recycling industry. Join us at Mr. E-Cycle, where technology meets environmental responsibility for a sustainable and greener future. 

#ERecycling #Sustainability #CircularEconomy #EnvironmentalStewardship #InnovationInRecycling

Name: Centerpoint Industries
Description:
At Centerpoint Industries, we deliver secure, sustainable, and profitable IT asset disposition solutions for enterprise clients across the East Coast. Our mission is to transform your surplus, outdated, or unwanted IT equipment into a new revenue stream while ensuring the highest standards of data security and environmental responsibility.

We specialize in a comprehensive suite of services including asset evaluation, secure data destruction, and efficient logistics. Our experienced team conducts thorough assessments of your assets to determine the most accurate and fair market value. We then provide a customized, transparent quote and handle all aspects of pickup, removal, and processing—at no extra cost for pickup and handling. With our state-of-the-art methods, every data-bearing device is securely wiped or physically destroyed, and you receive a Certificate of Data Destruction within 15 days of pickup. This guarantees that your sensitive information is completely eradicated, mitigating any risk of data breaches.

In addition to maximizing asset recovery, we are committed to responsible recycling practices. Our environmentally friendly process ensures that unsellable items are recycled according to strict regulatory standards, thereby reducing landfill waste and supporting your company’s sustainability goals. We work closely with certified recyclers and adhere to industry-leading guidelines such as NIST 800-88, providing you with detailed environmental impact reports that quantify the positive impact of responsible recycling.

Our team takes pride in our white-glove service approach, treating every client with personalized care and professionalism. Whether you’re an MSP, cybersecurity firm, or a large enterprise, our flexible solutions are designed to integrate seamlessly into your existing operations, freeing up valuable space and resources while generating additional cash flow from retired assets.

Name: Everyone Digital CIC
Description:
Everyone Digital is your trusted partner for secure, certified IT asset disposal services across the UK. We specialise in supporting charities, social enterprises, and businesses, enabling their digital inclusion projects.

Through our professional IT disposal services, we collect surplus technology, securely wipe hard drives using accredited software, and refurbish devices to extend their life. These devices are then either returned to our partners for distribution or provided directly to their intended recipients, ensuring maximum community impact.

You may also choose to donate your surplus tech to projects we already support, such as our sister charity, Every Child Online. This vital initiative addresses the digital isolation faced by children in deprived communities, providing them with access to technology and education. Every Child Online also runs the Safe and Smart Online programme, equipping children, young adults, and parents with essential online safety skills.

In addition, we work with partners like Essex Scouts on the Digital Scouts project, which combines digital inclusion with leadership and skill development for young Scouts. Together, these initiatives ensure that surplus technology reaches those who need it most while tackling the digital divide head-on.

By partnering with Everyone Digital, you not only secure your IT disposal needs but also contribute to reducing digital isolation, empowering communities, and promoting sustainability. Let’s transform unused tech into a brighter future for all.

Name: Спеціаліст ІТ
AuTimation
Description:
Nooit meer switchen tussen apps om verlichting, verwarming of gordijnen te bedienen. 

Al uw entiteiten bedienen vanaf één app/programma.
Om het bedieningsgemak zo optimaal mogelijk te maken én houden wordt er gebruik gemaakt van één programma waar alle apparaten vandaan te volgen en te bedienen zijn.
Er zijn twee mogelijkheden:
Bediening vanuit huis (eigen netwerk)
Bediening buitenshuis
 
Vanaf uw eigen afgeschermde thuisnetwerk houdt u alle camera’s en bewegingssensoren in de gaten, geheel beveiligd voor de ‘buitenwereld’.
 
Wilt u alles ook buitenshuis in de gaten houden en bedienen? Dan verzorgen we een beveiligde verbinding met enkel de apparaten en/of gebruikers waarvoor u toestemming geeft.

BEDIENING VANUIT HUIS
We installeren een minicomputer in bijvoorbeeld uw meterkast welke in verbinding staat met uw eigen netwerk.
Omdat deze wordt aangesloten op uw eigen netwerk heeft u volledig in de hand of u deze in verbinding wilt laten staan met internet (encrypted) of geheel af wilt schermen van de buitenwereld.
Één van de vele mogelijkheden is bijvoorbeeld om een tablet aan de muur te bevestigen met daarop altijd de status van uw woning, uw energieverbruik of een gegenereerde plattegrond van uw woning.

BEDIENING BUITENSHUIS
Middels een beveiligde (encrypted) verbinding met de server kunt u ook buitenshuis uw woning bedienen.
U krijgt een app op uw telefoon en tablet én u kunt via een webbrowser inloggen op uw systeem.
Bent u bijvoorbeeld vergeten de lichten uit te zetten, de verwarming te verlagen of de airco uit te schakelen? Dan kunt u dit op elk moment van de dag overal ter wereld regelen. 

ENERGIEBESPARING
Het systeem kan u ook inzicht geven op uw energieverbruik. Wij installeren slimme meters zodat u duidelijk inzicht krijgt op uw elektriciteitsverbruik en gas verbruik.

Name: Qwerty-Tech.nl
Description:
QWERTY-TECH.NL, opgericht in 2017, vertegenwoordigt een inspirerend hoofdstuk in ons verhaal als pionier in het professionele refurbishment landschap van Nederland. Sinds onze oprichting hebben we met trots de leiding genomen in het veredelingsproces van Lenovo ThinkPads, waardoor we zijn uitgegroeid tot een onbetwiste marktleider, vooral geworteld in de West-Europese regio. Ons dagelijkse ritueel van het verwerken van zendingen voor bedrijven belichaamt niet alleen onze onvermoeibare toewijding aan klanttevredenheid, maar benadrukt ook de groeiende voorkeur van bedrijven voor duurzame oplossingen.

Sinds onze bescheiden start hebben we de norm gesteld voor hoogwaardige refurbished Lenovo ThinkPads. Ons refurbishmentproces geeft een tweede leven aan gebruikte elektronica en we zijn er trots op dat we niet alleen productkwaliteit leveren, maar ook bijdragen aan duurzaamheid. Het verlengen van de levensduur van elektronica is voor ons niet slechts een doel, maar een verantwoordelijkheid, waarbij we actief deelnemen aan het verminderen van elektronisch afval.

Als een opvallend gezicht in West-Europa hebben we niet alleen regionale bekendheid verworven, maar ook een reputatie opgebouwd als een betrouwbare partner voor bedrijven die streven naar duurzaamheid. Ons leiderschap in de markt wordt versterkt door onze toewijding aan kwaliteitscontrole en uitstekende garantievoorwaarden, waardoor onze klanten vol vertrouwen zijn in de gereviseerde laptops die wij leveren.

In een relatief korte tijdspanne zijn we erin geslaagd om niet alleen een bedrijf te zijn dat refurbished technologie aanbiedt, maar ook een katalysator voor verandering in de manier waarop we omgaan met elektronica. Onze opmerkelijke groei en succes weerspiegelen niet alleen ons zakelijk inzicht, maar ook onze diepgewortelde toewijding aan duurzaamheid en klanttevredenheid.

Name: Rundle Networks
Description:
To transform buildings into intelligent, connected environments through secure networking, smart infrastructure, and innovative edge technologies creating a foundation for the next generation of digital operations in Alberta and beyond. 

Structured Cabling & Fibre Infrastructure
Rundle Networking designs and installs certified Cat6, Cat6A, and fibre-optic systems that form the backbone of today’s digital environments.
Every run is engineered for performance labeled, tested, and documented using Fluke certification to ensure full compliance with Alberta owner and TIA/EIA standards. From new construction to tenant retrofits, our team delivers clean, future-ready cabling that supports high-bandwidth voice, data, and PoE applications.

Wi-Fi Site Surveys & Heat-Mapping
Whether for a new design or an existing network audit, Rundle’s heat-mapping service ensures your wireless infrastructure performs seamlessly and scales to Wi-Fi 6 / 7 standards.

NERC CIP High-Buildout Services
Critical facilities demand more than connectivity, they require protection.
Rundle Networking delivers secure network environments that align with NERC CIP physical and cyber standards.
Our high-buildout solutions include secure cabling pathways, shielded terminations, access-controlled telecom rooms, and full asset documentation for compliance audits. We support Alberta’s utilities, energy producers, and data-centre operators with infrastructure that is certified.

Maintenance, Support & Re-Certification
Rundle Networking offers ongoing service programs for re-surveying, expansion, and re-certification. We proactively test cabling, verify PoE loads, and refresh Wi-Fi heat-maps to maintain peak performance year-round.
Our maintenance plans minimize downtime, extend asset life, and ensure compliance with corporate and regulatory standards. 

Edge, IoT & Low-Voltage Integration 
Rundle bridges traditional IT infrastructure with emerging building-intelligence systems.

Name: National IT Disposal
Description:
National IT Disposal was formed as the market required a secure IT Asset Disposal provider that cares about the needs of its clients by listening to them and creating tailored service options bespoke to their requirements.

National IT Disposal is built upon three core values:
- The provision of excellent service
- A transparent operating structure
- Ethical and environmentally friendly conduct in all of our processes

We offer a free IT Asset Disposal service to organisations and businesses across the entire United Kingdom. 

How does our zero charge service work?

1- We collect redundant IT equipment from our client's premises using our GPS tracked and CCTV monitored fleet of vehicles with our DBS checked collection operatives. 

2- As soon as our operative loads the equipment onto the vehicle, your company is issued a notice of waste transfer as per UK legislation. A waste transfer note proves that your organisation has disposed of its e-waste legally and responsibly.

3- Your collected items are catalogued, and a complete asset report is issued.

4- All data-bearing items such as Hard Drives, Solid State Drives, and Storage Media is data sanitised or physically destroyed based on the requirements of our clients. An itemised data destruction certificate is then issued, proving that all data has been irreversibly destroyed. This keeps our clients' sensitive data safe, securing their reputation and compliance with data-related legislation such as GDPR.

National IT Disposal operates a strict zero-landfill policy. All components and devices are recycled.

We take pride in being the leading provider of IT disposal services to both public and private sector organisations, providing robust and dependable solutions. Our dedication and commitment has enabled us to grow into who we are today – the UK’s most respected and trusted IT asset disposal provider.

Name: SS Recycling FZC
Description:
At SS Recycling, we specialise in the professional sorting, testing, and recycling of used and end-of-life IT equipment. 

Founded in 2025 and based in Sharjah, UAE, we deliver sustainable solutions for businesses looking to dispose of their electronic assets responsibly while recovering value through reuse and resale.

Every device entering our facility is carefully inspected and tested to determine whether it can be refurbished, repurposed, or recycled. Our skilled technicians ensure that working equipment is cleaned, repaired, and certified through rigorous testing, giving technology a second life and reducing environmental impact.

For items that cannot be reused, we follow strict e-waste recycling protocols, ensuring safe dismantling, recovery of usable materials, and responsible handling of hazardous components. Our detailed sorting process helps maximize the efficiency of both recycling and resale, in line with our commitment to sustainable resource management.

We prioritize: – Large-scale IT asset clear-outs
– Secure and compliant data destruction
– In-depth testing and grading of laptops, PC's, and accessories
– Eco-conscious dismantling and component recovery
– Transparent inventory tracking and reporting

SS Recycling, we’re building a more sustainable tech ecosystem—reducing e-waste, supporting local jobs, and supplying the region with reliable, refurbished IT hardware.

Strengths:
– Sustainable Sorting & Functional Testing
– Refurbishment, Repair & Resale
– Environmentally Responsible Recycling
– Data Security & Certificate-Backed Handling
– End-to-End Inventory Control & Compliance

Whether you're clearing out IT assets or sourcing reusable tech, SS Recycling ensures equipment is handled with care, compliance, and a sustainable purpose.

 Kiváló képminőségű LED- és Digital Signage kijelzők széles választékát forgalmazzuk, amelyeket promóciós, információs és vizuális kommunikációs célokra terveztek – beltéri és kültéri alkalmazásra egyaránt.

Akár DOOH- vagy HORECA-megjelenésekről, oktatásról, sporteseményekről, közlekedésről vagy vállalati környezetről van szó, a kijelzők könnyedén integrálhatók a meglévő rendszerekbe. A moduláris kialakítású változatok teljes körű testreszabhatóságot biztosítanak.

A Hisense kereskedelmi és üzleti kijelzők hivatalos magyarországi forgalmazójaként segítünk megtalálni a számodra legjobb megoldást.
–
A VisionFlow nem csak kijelzőtechnológiát kínál, hanem rugalmas, skálázható és megbízható rendszereket, amelyekkel üzeneteid bárhol, bármikor, korlátok nélkül elérik a közönségedet.

Name: ParliX IT solutions
Description:
ParliX IT Solutions ondersteunt organisaties bij het optimaal benutten van hun ICT- en energieomgeving. Wij leveren betrouwbare, toekomstbestendige oplossingen op het gebied van systeem- en netwerkbeheer, cloudoplossingen en duurzame energie- en batterijopslagoplossingen. Ons doel is organisaties in staat te stellen zich volledig te richten op hun kernactiviteiten, groei en innovatie, terwijl wij zorgen voor een stabiele, veilige en efficiënte infrastructuur.

Bij ParliX IT Solutions geloven we dat technologie en energie strategische hulpmiddelen zijn die organisaties helpen te groeien en concurrerend te blijven. Daarom bieden wij niet alleen standaardoplossingen, maar werken wij nauw samen met onze klanten om maatwerkoplossingen te creëren die aansluiten op hun specifieke behoeften en doelstellingen. Onze expertise stelt ons in staat om complexe ICT-omgevingen en energieoplossingen eenvoudig, betrouwbaar en toekomstbestendig te maken.

Onze diensten omvatten onder andere het beheer van systemen en netwerken, implementatie van cloudoplossingen, en advisering en installatie van duurzame energie- en batterijopslagoplossingen. Door deze gecombineerde aanpak optimaliseren wij zowel de operationele efficiëntie als het energieverbruik van onze klanten, wat resulteert in lagere kosten en een kleinere ecologische voetafdruk.

ParliX IT Solutions staat bekend om zijn klantgerichte aanpak. Wij luisteren naar de wensen en uitdagingen van onze klanten, denken actief mee en bieden oplossingen die niet alleen technisch robuust zijn, maar ook praktisch toepasbaar in de dagelijkse bedrijfsvoering. Onze focus ligt op betrouwbaarheid, continuïteit en innovatie.

Met onze ondersteuning kunnen organisaties zich concentreren op groei, innovatie en resultaat, terwijl zij erop vertrouwen dat hun ICT- en energieomgeving in goede handen is. Wij combineren technische expertise met strategisch inzicht, zodat technologie en energie écht waarde toevoegen aan het bedrijf.

Name: AIT Electronics Recycling

From data centers to corporate offices, we handle every step of the ITAD process including R2-compliant electronics recycling, data destruction with Certificate of Destruction, asset serialization and on-site and off-site services - so you don’t have to. 

Our services include: 
-End-to-End ITAD Management: Uninstalling, transporting, and recycling your IT equipment. 
-Certified Data Destruction: Fully compliant with HIPAA, SOX, GDPR, PIPEDA, NIST 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, and IEEE standards. 
-Office Relocation Support: Seamlessly move your office while securely recycling e-waste. 
-Sustainability Reporting: Certificate of Recycling and Certificate of Destruction provided, helping you meet your ESG compliance goals.

Contact us now for a free quote today!
